name: Maximum Sum of an Hourglass
description:
You are given an m x n integer matrix grid.

An hourglass is a subset of values with indices matching the following form in the matrix:

A B C
  D
E F G

Return the maximum sum of the elements of an hourglass.

  • m == grid.length
  • n == grid[i].length
  • 3 <= m, n <= 150
